title: EasyPrefix
description: The simplest and most optimized way to manage prefixes, suffixes, and chat formatting.
body:
# EasyPrefix
**Simple, optimized and lightweight prefix management.**

---
![NameTag Format (Prefix and suffix)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a3be5947fed2a575caeb50903129bafd01a40d9_0.webp)

![Tablist Format](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79c5f4428cc4f87758274a24386ed411e57b1674_0.webp)

![Chat Format](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/498361d1c11f24d601e03f723daef38624eb4dcc_0.webp)

### Key Features
* **Full Integration:** Native support for **PlaceholderAPI** and **Hex/RGB** colors.
* **All-in-One Sync:** Manage Chat, Tablist, and Nametags from a single place.
* **Smart Priority:** Automatically applies prefixes based on group weight/priority.
* **High Performance:** Lightweight code designed for high player counts.
* **Custom Events:** Personalized Join and Quit messages per group.

### Commands & Permissions
* **`/easyprefix reload`** - Reloads the configuration.
* **Permission:** `easyprefix.admin`

---
*Compatible with Spigot, Paper and Folia | 1.16 - 1.21+*
